title: Ridgeline Watch: Budgeted Fire-Tower Placement
strategies: cost-ascending fill: buy the cheapest sites first while the budget lasts, ignoring what they actually watch (reproduces the evaluator's weak coverage-blind reference, scores ~0.1)

ratio-greedy budgeted coverage: repeatedly build the affordable site with the highest NEW-watched-weight-per-cost, never revising, so early ratio-optimal picks that overlap later value leave weight uncollected

warm-started local search: seed from ratio- and absolute-gain greedy, then hill-climb add / drop-and-swap moves on a per-cell coverage-count grid to reclaim value one-shot greedy overlaps away, staying below the unaffordable all-towers ceiling
invalid over-budget plan: build every site so total cost blows the budget and the plan is rejected -> 0.0
